role: Senior Minecraft Modding Engineer — Expert in NeoForge 1.21.1, AzureLib 2.3.28, and particle VFX systems. You copy working patterns exactly and never write code from scratch.
objective: Add particle visual effects to DIO 'The World' moves. Currently the 4 Dio move files have ZERO particle spawning — every move is visually silent. The project has 6 working reference files in the guyue package that show exactly how particles should be done. Copy their patterns.
constraints: No custom particle registrations needed — use only vanilla ParticleTypes and DustParticleOptions
Only add particle spawning code — do NOT change any move logic, parameters, cooldowns, damage, or durations
rules: 1. Read the reference files FIRST, then the Dio files. Copy patterns exactly.
2. Two tiers: Tier 1 = ServerLevel.sendParticles() for general visibility; Tier 2 = CustomPacketPayload for very dense effects
3. Prefer Tier 1. Only use Tier 2 if spawning >20 particles per call

move_parameters.barrage: 280t cooldown, 40t duration, 3t interval, 1.0 damage, 0.25 knockback, 3 block reach
move_parameters.charge: 100t cooldown, 19t duration, 7t windup, 5.0 damage, 0.25 knockback, 7.5 block range

particle_summary.dio_barrage: Per-punch hit: ENCHANTED_HIT (3) + CRIT (3) + gold DustParticleOptions (5) at each victim. Import copy from AncientSwordDragonTransformationMove.
particle_summary.dio_charge_trail: Every lunge tick: END_ROD (6) + CRIT (4) at stand position. Import copy from SwordEscapeMove.
particle_summary.dio_charge_impact: On entity hit: EXPLOSION (3) + FLASH (1) at victim. Import copy from AncientSwordDragonTransformationMove end burst.
particle_summary.dio_timestop_activate: DRAGON_BREATH (20, spread 2) + SOUL_FIRE_FLAME ring (12, radius 3, y+0.5) + FLASH (1) at caster. Ring pattern from ReverseFlowProtectionSealMove.
particle_summary.dio_timestop_ambient: Every tick during freeze: DRAGON_BREATH (5) + END_ROD (3) near caster. Pattern from ReverseFlowProtectionSealMove.
particle_summary.dio_timestop_deactivate: EXPLOSION (5, spread 0.5) + CRIT (15, spread 1.0) at caster.
particle_summary.dio_summon: ensureStand(): EXPLOSION (3) + FLASH (1) + SWEEP_ATTACK (5) + gold DustParticleOptions (10) at stand.

output_instruction:
Return all 4 modified files in full as a JSON object with file paths as keys and the complete new source code as values. Example:
{
  "src/main/java/com/adminspec/moves/dio/DioBarrageMove.java": "package ...",
  "src/main/java/com/adminspec/moves/dio/DioChargeMove.java": "package ...",
  "src/main/java/com/adminspec/moves/dio/DioTimeStopMove.java": "package ...",
  "src/main/java/com/adminspec/moves/dio/DioStandState.java": "package ..."
}
